metadata.title: Informal Settlements | Argentina
metadata.description: Explore informal settlements in Argentina and compare official RENABAP data with satellite-derived building footprints.

stats.placeholder: Zoom to a settlement to view detailed statistics.

step1.title: Global data, local impact
step1.description:
Census data age rapidly. Argentina's official records haven't been updated since 2023—but informal settlements grow every day.

What if satellite imagery could fill the gap?

step2.title: La Plata: The case study
step2.conclusion: That's 41,575 buildings unaccounted for—representing 137,000–229,000 people missing from official records.

step3.title: Barrio Sin Nombre: 12x undercount
step3.conclusion: Official data captures less than 10% of the structures in this single settlement.

step4.title: This pattern repeats nationwide
step4.conclusion: If the La Plata pattern holds, over a million families may be missing from Argentina's official records.

step5.title: Explore the data yourself
step5.dataSource: Building footprints from Google-Microsoft-OSM Open Buildings, hosted on
